## Feature Description
**Clear and concise description of the feature you'd like:**


## Problem or Use Case
**What problem does this solve? What use case does it enable?**


## Proposed Solution
**How would you like this to work?**


## Alternative Solutions
**Have you considered any alternative approaches?**


## Alignment with NeuroVerse Philosophy
**How does this align with NeuroVerse's core principles?**
- [ ] **Sovereignty First** — Does not require server-side data collection or mandatory cloud sync
- [ ] **Local-First** — Works offline or with minimal network dependency
- [ ] **Zero-Trust** — Does not compromise user privacy or introduce surveillance
- [ ] **Immersion Intact** — Preserves Echelon's voice and the mythic-tech aesthetic
- [ ] **Canonical Architecture** — Respects the 7-Box Engine, 96-lesson structure, or archetype system

## Potential Impact
**Who benefits from this feature?**
- [ ] All operators
- [ ] Self-hosters/developers
- [ ] Mobile users specifically
- [ ] Accessibility improvements
- [ ] Internationalization/localization
- [ ] Work Mode users (Design/Build/Lead)
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Implementation Complexity
**Your estimate (optional):**
- [ ] Minor (UI polish, copy changes)
- [ ] Moderate (new component, hook, or page)
- [ ] Major (architectural change, new system)
- [ ] Unknown

## Additional Context
**Any mockups, examples, or references:**


## Willingness to Contribute
- [ ] I would like to implement this feature myself (with guidance)
- [ ] I can help test this feature once implemented
- [ ] I am requesting this as a user only
